name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-21
title: Step 2 HUMAN-APPROVAL banner format inconsistent with other steps
description: Steps 1, 3-9 in the assembled prompt use a heavy ASCII banner: 'STEP N — NAME' between equals-rule lines. Step 2 HUMAN-APPROVAL alone is rendered as a plain markdown '## Step 2 — HUMAN-APPROVAL' header (dispatch-tdd-subagent.py lines 249, 253). Visually a different artifact, and the bypass path (line 249) also uses the markdown form. Either standardise on the banner format for all 9 steps, or normalise all to markdown. The mismatch is jarring for any reader of the assembled prompt and may confuse subagents that pattern-match on banner sections.
